## Summary

## Testing

- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] I added or updated tests for changed behavior, or explained why none are needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] I signed off commits with `git commit -s`.
- [ ] I did not add telemetry without opt-in.
- [ ] I did not bypass command or file-edit approvals.
- [ ] I updated docs for user-facing behavior.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, private session data, or user repository content.

## Security, storage, or migration impact

<!-- Note changes to approvals, command/file access, provider context, IPC, stored data, updates, or compatibility. Write "None" when not applicable. -->
